name: Zhejiang Juhua Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Juhua Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells fluorine chemicals products under the Juhua brand in China. Its products include ODS substitutes, fluoropolymers, fluorine-containing fine chemicals, methane chlorides, inorganic fluorochemicals, macro molecular materials, organic chemicals, fine chemicals, inorganic chemical materials, and caprolactam. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Quzhou, China.
